_publications._publicationTitle: Graph complexity analysis identifies an ETV5 tumor-specific network in human and murine low-grade glioma.

_contextSnippet: Four hundred twenty-seven human glioma gene expression profiles were obtained... combined to create a network using the ARACNe-AP... uses mutual information (MI) to measure similarity across genes and then bootstrapping
details: Successfully created regulatory network from 427 human glioma gene expression profiles using mutual information and bootstrapping to measure strength and consistency of gene similarities
